title: inula dalzellii
intro: Inula dalzellii, also known as the Indian Inula, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Inula dalzellii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Inula dalzellii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
